title: Calcium-Phosphorus Balance: How Modern Diets Affect Your Bones, Kidneys, and Heart
description: Phosphorus-loaded processed foods are quietly wrecking a mineral ratio your bones, kidneys, and heart depend on. Most Western diets are already far outside the safe zone.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for Calcium-Phosphorus Balance: How Modern Diets Affect Your Bones, Kidneys, and Heart
